title: Virgin Atlantic
tagline: "Better" is underspecified — three theses bracket the design space. Editorial silence, booking-as-tool, drenched Virgin red. Brand-faithful: type and palette pinned.

direction.phrase: Redesign the Virgin Atlantic home page to make it better. Pin typography and color palette. Reuse images strictly via public URL. Produce 3 distinct variants.
movements: "better" resolved as 3-variant fan-out (each variant defines its own "better")
composition + density + tone: rolled per variant

seed.pickedBy: rolled per variant on non-locked dimensions

originalCritique: The current home shouts. Every band repeats a search/login/loyalty trio; the booking widget competes for attention with promo carousels; type ladders ad-hoc through six unrelated sizes. The brand has personality — confident, slightly cheeky, premium — but the page hides it under a SaaS-like dashboard of CTAs. Three different things are broken — too dense, too generic, too quiet on personality — so we propose three different ways of being better.

variants.name: Editorial sky
variants.thesis: The current home shouts; Virgin's premium promise sells better through silence and confidence. One big idea above the fold (a sky, a destination, a single sentence); booking widget present but subordinate; long vertical rhythm with editorial spacing; one feature per fold.
variants.fix: The current home shouts; Virgin's premium promise sells better through silence and confidence. One big idea above the fold — a sky, a destination, a single sentence — booking widget present but subordinate. Long vertical rhythm with editorial spacing; one feature per fold; type at a 1.333 editorial ratio. The brand finally trusts itself enough to stop selling so hard.

variants.name: Smart booking
variants.thesis: Most home-page visitors are returning to book. Reduce time-to-fare; make the page a tool. Booking widget IS the hero, full-width, with ambient sky behind; routes/deals scannable in dense rows below; reward seats and Flying Club promoted by data, not prose.
variants.fix: Most home-page visitors are returning to book. The booking widget IS the hero — full-width, with ambient sky behind — utility before signature. Routes and deals scannable in dense rows below; reward seats and Flying Club promoted by data (price, miles, dates), not prose. Density packed, expression restrained, tone confident-practical. The page becomes a tool, not a brochure.

variants.name: Vivid Virgin
variants.thesis: Virgin's edge is personality. The current site is too polite about it. Lean in — full-bleed crops, bigger type, the red louder. Red used as canvas, not accent; type set TIGHT and BIG; destinations as poster-style tiles.
variants.fix: Virgin's edge is personality. The current site is too polite about it. Lean in — full-bleed hero crop with oversized headline (1.5 ratio); red used as canvas, not accent, in one signature band; destinations as poster-style tiles; type set TIGHT and BIG. Expression drenched, distinctiveness singular, tone playful-confident. The loud is brand-specific Virgin red, not generic SaaS "vibrant".
